versions.version_description: This version includes a more chords to highlight the melody more and add more dramatic color to the song.
Ab Version in the realm of Brenda Lee Original w/ a Partridge Family Twist for Christmas Show by Misti Koop. Tab by Joseph Vincent McCauley.
Easy Tab with only three chords (tonic, subdominant, dominant).
Fairly simplified but still difficult version that is easy to play with the begging ridd.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Found no perfect version of the song. So hear here a updated version.

recommended.song_name: Santa Claus Is Coming To Town

content:
Rockin Around The Christmas Tree
Brenda Lee 1958 (Johnny Marks)

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rockin%27_Around_the_Christmas_Tree

Capo I

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch] *
Rocking around the Christmas tree[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
At the Christmas party hop[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]D7[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D7[/ch]
Mistletoe hung where you can see[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Every couple tries to stop.[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Rocking around the Christmas tree,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D7[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Let the Christmas spirit ring[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Later we ll have some pumpkin pie[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
And well do some caroling.[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C6[/ch]
You will get a sentimental[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Feeling when you hear[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Voices singing lets be jolly,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]D7[/ch]
Deck the halls with boughs of holly.[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Rocking around the Christmas tree,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
Have a happy holiday[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Everyone dancing merrily[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
In the new old-fashioned way.[/tab]

Break

[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C6[/ch]
You will get a sentimental[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Feeling when you hear[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Voices singing lets be jolly,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]D7[/ch]
Deck the halls with boughs of holly.[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Rocking around the Christmas tree,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
Have a happy holiday[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Everyone dancing merrily[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
In the new old-fashioned way.[/tab]

* It has been suggested alternating back and forth from a G to a G6 on the first line of the verses.
  That makes it swing.

Set8
